backend/ingredient-store.mo: Defines ingredient data types (SkinType, IngredientSafety, IngredientInfo) and provides a Map-based store module with functions to add, retrieve, and list all ingredients.
backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing skincare analysis backend with user management, questionnaire results, product recommendations, ingredient analysis, favorites, routines, product notes, and role-based access control using MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the downloadable archive feature for exporting all project source files, linking to fileContentMap.ts and multiple components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, utilities, and configuration with descriptions of their functionality and styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for UI components including sidebar, charts, and semantic colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the SkinCare Analyzer app with html2pdf.js CDN script included for PDF export functionality.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all route definitions and ProfileRedirectHandler that redirects authenticated users without complete profile intro to the profile intro page.
Displays user's skin analysis history with cards showing detected skin type, timestamp, and concern levels with color-coded badges and icons.
frontend/src/components/ArticleCard.tsx: Card component for educational articles with category badges, truncated preview, and click-to-expand dialog showing full article content in a scrollable view.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: A React component that protects routes by checking Internet Identity authentication status, displaying loading or login prompts when unauthenticated, and rendering children when authenticated.
Displays a grid of skincare product cards with ingredient compatibility indicators and a summary table showing which ingredients are compatible with the user's skin profile.
frontend/src/components/ConnectivityCode: A tabbed interface displaying code examples for actor initialization, authentication, query hooks, mutations, error handling, and loading states with copy-to-clipboard functionality.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/DataFlo: Visualizes the application's data flow from UI components through React Query, actor layer, Motoko backend, to stable storage. Includes authentication flow documentation.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/ERDiagr: Displays entity-relationship diagram showing database schema with entity descriptions and key relationships between users, products, ingredients, routines, and analysis data.
A React component that displays a legend explaining ER diagram notation symbols (entities, attributes, relationships, and cardinality) in a styled card with emerald/teal theming.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/SchemaD: Renders a database schema visualization with an image diagram and a grid of SchemaTable components representing tables like users, products, ingredients, favorites, routines, and their relationships.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/SchemaT: A reusable component that displays a database table schema with columns, types, and constraints, using icons to indicate primary keys and foreign keys.
frontend/src/components/ExportButton.tsx: A button component that exports user profile, analysis history, routines, favorites, and product data as formatted HTML for printing or saving.
frontend/src/components/FileDownloadModa: A modal dialog that displays the project file tree in an accordion structure, allowing users to download individual files or generate and download a complete project ZIP archive.
frontend/src/components/IngredientAnalys: Allows users to input comma-separated ingredient names, validates them against the user's skin type, and displays detailed safety analysis results with color-coded classifications and compatibility scores.
frontend/src/components/IngredientCard.t: Displays a clickable card for a single ingredient showing its name, safety classification badge, description, and concern flags (acne-prone, sensitive, clog-prone) that opens a detail modal on click.
frontend/src/components/IngredientDetail: Modal component that displays detailed information about a skincare ingredient, including safety classification, description, suitable skin types, and concerns (acne-prone, sensitive, clog-prone) with color-coded badges and icons.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with sticky header navigation, including links to dashboard, favorites, journal, ingredients, and resources pages, plus login/logout functionality and data export capabilities.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and error handling, clearing query cache on logout.
Button component that generates and downloads a PDF export of referenced content using html2pdf.js library with configurable options for margins, quality, and page breaks.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component displaying skincare product details including name, brand, price range, description, concerns, and skin types, with favorite toggle, comparison checkbox, and note-taking functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProductNoteModal: Modal dialog for adding or editing product notes with star rating (1-5), notes text field, and usage experience field, saving to backend via mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProductRecommend: Displays personalized skincare product recommendations grouped by category (cleanser, serum, moisturizer, etc.), allows users to select up to 3 products for comparison, and navigates to a comparison page.
frontend/src/components/ProductSearchBar: A search input component with autocomplete functionality that fetches product suggestions as the user types and supports keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) for selecting products.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name before accessing the app, preventing dismissal until the profile is saved.
Displays progress metrics for skin concerns (acne, pigmentation, aging, dryness) with trend indicators (improvement/decline/stable) and provides insights on skin health changes over time.
frontend/src/components/Questionnaire.ts: A multi-step questionnaire component that collects user responses about skin characteristics, calculates skin type and concern levels using a scoring algorithm, and saves the results before navigating to the dashboard.
frontend/src/components/ReminderCard.tsx: Shows a dismissible reminder card prompting users to retake the questionnaire if their last analysis is over 3 months old, and displays seasonal skincare tips when applicable.
frontend/src/components/ResultsDisplay.t: Displays user's skin type analysis results, including skin type description, active concerns with severity levels, and product recommendations. Handles loading states and redirects to questionnaire if no results exist.
frontend/src/components/RoutineList.tsx: Renders a list of user's skincare routines with steps ordered by sequence and frequency. Provides delete functionality and shows empty state with call-to-action when no routines exist.
Displays tabbed SQL query examples (CREATE, INSERT, SELECT, UPDATE, DELETE, JOINs) with copy-to-clipboard functionality and descriptive explanations for each query type.
frontend/src/components/TrendChart.tsx: Renders a simple progress bar visualization for skin concern trends with color-coded severity levels (improvement, decline, stable).
frontend/src/components/UIScreenshotGall: Displays a gallery of UI screenshots with descriptions, key features, design elements, and annotations for each page in the application. Includes design theme documentation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication via Internet Identity, initializes access control with an admin token, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useExportData.ts: Hook that aggregates user data (profile, skin type, analysis history, favorites, routines, product notes) and exports it as a downloadable JSON file with toast notifications for success/error.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile introduction data from the backend actor, handling the case where no profile exists by returning null.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality, managing auth client creation, identity state, and login status throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user data (profiles, skin type results, favorites, routines, products, ingredients), with many methods stubbed as backend implementations are missing.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a healthcare-inspired color palette (emerald/teal primary colors) for both light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and neutral color scales.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/ComparisonPage.tsx: Protected page that compares 2-3 skincare products side-by-side, extracting product names from URL query parameters and displaying a comparison table with analysis based on user's skin type.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Protected dashboard page showing user's skincare journey overview with analysis history count, favorites, routines, progress tracker, reminders, and export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/DBMSDocumentationPage: Protected documentation page displaying database project details including AIM, ER diagrams, schema diagrams, SQL queries, UI screenshots, data flow diagrams, and connectivity code with PDF export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/FavoritesPage.tsx: Protected page displaying user's saved favorite skincare products filtered from all product recommendations, with empty state when no favorites exist.
frontend/src/pages/IngredientAnalysisPag: Protected page wrapper that renders the IngredientAnalysis component for analyzing skincare product ingredients.
frontend/src/pages/IngredientDictionaryP: Protected page displaying a searchable database of all skincare ingredients with filtering capability and ingredient cards showing detailed information.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component featuring a hero section with product search, call-to-action buttons for questionnaire and ingredient analysis, and sections showcasing features and comprehensive skincare tools.
frontend/src/pages/ProductJournalPage.ts: Auth-protected page displaying user's product notes and reviews with star ratings, showing a list of journal entries or an empty state if none exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProductSuitabilityChe: Auth-protected page that allows users to check product suitability by entering product names or ingredients, featuring autocomplete suggestions and displaying detailed analysis results including ingredient safety and compatibility with user's skin type.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileIntroPage.tsx: Auth-protected onboarding page that collects user profile information (name, age, optional email) with form validation before redirecting to the questionnaire.
frontend/src/pages/QuestionnairePage.tsx: Simple wrapper page that renders the Questionnaire component within an AuthGuard.
frontend/src/pages/ResourcesPage.tsx: Educational resources page with searchable and categorized articles about skincare topics (skin types, concerns, ingredients, routines) displayed in a tabbed interface.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Simple wrapper page that renders the ResultsDisplay component within an AuthGuard.
frontend/src/pages/RoutineBuilderPage.ts: Auth-protected page for creating custom skincare routines by adding, ordering, and configuring product steps with frequency settings, pulling from recommended products and favorites.
frontend/src/pages/RoutinesPage.tsx: Displays a list of user's skincare routines with loading state and a button to create new routines. Uses AuthGuard to protect the page and fetches routines via useGetRoutines hook.
Provides code examples demonstrating Internet Computer connectivity patterns including actor initialization with authentication, Internet Identity login flow, and React Query hooks for data fetching. Serves as documentation for ICP integration patterns.
frontend/src/utils/educationalContent.ts: Defines educational articles about skin types, concerns, ingredients, and routines. Maps skin type descriptions to structured content for user education throughout the app.
frontend/src/utils/exportFormatter.ts: Generates HTML export reports containing user profiles, skin analysis history, products, routines, and notes. Formats data into a printable document with styling for both screen and print media.
frontend/src/utils/fileContentMap.ts: Maps file paths to their complete source code content for the project, including backend Motoko code, frontend configuration, and component files. Used for generating downloadable project archives or documentation.
frontend/src/utils/fileTreeData.ts: Defines the complete project file tree structure as a hierarchical data model with folders and files. Used for rendering file explorers or project structure visualizations.
frontend/src/utils/questionnaireData.ts: Defines the Question interface and exports an array of 10 skin analysis questions covering skin feel, pore size, texture, sensitivity, breakouts, and specific concerns (acne, pigmentation, aging, dryness) with multiple-choice options.
frontend/src/utils/readmeGenerator.ts: Exports a function that generates comprehensive README markdown content documenting the skin analysis platform's database architecture, DBMS concepts, features, and CRUD operations (content appears truncated).
frontend/src/utils/seasonalTips.ts: Provides seasonal skincare tips (winter, spring, summer, fall) based on the current month, returning appropriate advice for weather-related skin concerns.
Maps each SkinType enum to detailed descriptions including tagline, characteristics, care tips, and recommended ingredients for oily, dry, combination, sensitive, and normal skin types.
frontend/src/utils/sqlExamples.ts: Contains SQL DDL examples for creating database tables (users, skin_type_results, products, ingredients, favorites, routines, etc.) and DML INSERT statements for sample data (content appears truncated).
frontend/src/utils/uiScreenshots.ts: Exports an array documenting UI pages with descriptions, key features, design elements, and annotations for landing page, questionnaire, results, dashboard, favorites, routines, routine builder, and product journal screens.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/zipGenerator.ts: Generates a text-based archive of project files by recursively collecting file contents and combining them into a single downloadable text file with file path markers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including typography, colors using OKLCH color space, container settings, font families, and various design tokens.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking schema version, architectural notes, existing features for file downloading, and a pending feature request to fix FileDownloadModal to display actual source code content.
